name: data-engineer-plugin
description: Marketplace for data-engineer-plugin — Claude Code helpers for ADO PR review work, with /address-pr as the first helper. Sibling marketplace to api-scraper.

plugins.name: data-engineer-plugin
plugins.description: 3-phase ADO PR-review-addressing flow that parallelizes across PRs via claude-squad. Triage (categorize comments) → Address (edits + commits in a per-PR worktree) → Handoff (push checklist + draft replies). Stops one step before push.
